zh.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandie於大約0985年出生在法國諾門迪盧。她於1025年與Tancrède de Hauteville在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培斯-馬利斯巴結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1058年在法國福朗斯 米希享年74歲，埋葬在義大利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandie于大约0985年出生在法国諾門迪盧。她于1025年与Tancrède de Hauteville在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培斯-馬利斯巴结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1058年在法国福朗斯 米希享年74岁，埋葬在意大利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Normandie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

variants.name: Normand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Pierre, Amie, Donat, Emile, Herve, Jacques, Jean Noel, Jean-Michel.
French and Breton (mainly Finistère; also Le Normand): habitational name for someone from Normandy, a region in northern France (see Norman ). Compare Lenormand .

variants.name: Normandy
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandie was born about 0985, in Rouen, Normandy, France. She married Tancrède de Hauteville in 1025, in Basse, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1058, in France Mission, France, at the age of 74, and was buried in Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandie est née environ 0985, à Rouen, Normandie, France. Elle a épousé Tancrède de Hauteville en 1025, à Basse, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1058, à France Mission, France, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandie wurde um 0985 in Rouen, Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat 1025 in Basse, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich Tancrède de Hauteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1058 im Alter von 74 Jahren in France Mission, Frankreich und wurde in Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandie è nata il circa 0985 nel Rouen, Normandie, Francia. Lei sposato Tancrède de Hauteville nel 1025, nel Basse, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1058, nel France Mission, Francia, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandieは約0985年にフランスノーマンディロウンで生まれた。1025年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-マリティメスバッセでTancrède de Hautevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1058年にフランスフランス ミシオンで74歳で死去し，イタリアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandie(은)는 대략 0985년 프랑스 노먼디 루언에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1025년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-마이팀스 배스에서 Tancrède de Hauteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1058년 프랑스 프랜스 미시언에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandie nasceu aproximadamente 0985, em Rouen, Normandie, França. Ela casou-se com Tancrède de Hauteville em 1025, em Basse, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1058, em France Mission, França, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandie родилась около 0985 г. в местности роуен, норманди, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Tancrède de Hauteville в 1025 г. в местности басс, алпес-маритимесь, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1058 г. в местности фрэнс миссион, Франция в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Fressenda de Normandie nació aproximadamente 0985, en Rouen, Normandie, Francia. Se casó con Tancrède de Hauteville en 1025, en Basse, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1058, en France Mission, Francia, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Italia.
